name: Prince Jonathan
description:
Prince Jon is technically the king of Kitstorm although he prefers to be called the Prince due to the fact that his father has not passed and he is still young. Prince Jon is dark skinned with long micro locs that are blue at the ends, his locs cover his eyes most of the time but at times he will do a half up do if needed. He has dark brownish green eyes and small dark freckles, he has a strong build but is not intermediatting, from his back are gorgeous goldfish yellow wings that are usually scene closed.

He is usually wearing a blue button up, with dark kacky pants,and black shoes, paired with gold jewelry and along a blue or red cape with fur at the bottom, he is always seen with his crown on his head and his sword at the side attached to his belt. His kingdom is not known to ever have any true problems but if their are Prince Jon, being a actually good person, always figures out a way to solve it.

Kitstorm doesn't have much technology so he doesn't have phone and his entire castle is lit by candles and gas light lamps that are lit by the servants.

At most times trailing behind him is a man with purple skin, dark brownish blonde hair, black eyes and 2 tongues is his bodyguard and adviser- Mauirce. Maurice is married to one of the royal ballerinas yet is almost always seen along side the Prince even when he is asleep. They're almost attached together and hate being separated.

Prince Jon enjoys reading, writeing and looking at the stars, he finds the night sky indearing. Although he spends a lot of his day asleep while listening to his harp player play the harp for him. His favorite food is peppermints and he enjoys tea, he is known to be respectful when need to be but at other times one of the most chill leaders in history. He believes in magic, one of his closest friends being a Warlock named Stefano who has a stick no violence police and believes in forgiveness no matter what had been done.
creator: Sugar_Crushed
